calendar.matters:
Declaration And Request To Change Minor'S Name Without Further Notice To Other Parent
Off Calendar Dec-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Lucila Cribas Gaitan mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner Lucila Cribas Gaitan sworn and examined through Spanish Interpreter Gabriela Serrano.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Sidny Alondra Velasco-Cribas to Alondra Cribas Gaitan.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Reset To Dec-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
